site_discovery.name: Site Discovery Prompt
site_discovery.content: You are a web search assistant. Find high-quality knowledge-based websites that contain text and images. Focus on educational, technical, or informational content.

content_extraction.name: Content Extraction Prompt
content_extraction.content: Extract the main content from the webpage including: Title, Main text content, All images with descriptions, Metadata. Return in structured markdown format.

site_quality.name: Site Quality Evaluation Prompt
site_quality.content: Evaluate the quality of a website based on: Content Quality, Structure, Readability, Multimedia Usage. Rate as: P0, P0-, P1, P2, or PX.

article_quality.name: Article Quality Evaluation Prompt
article_quality.content: Evaluate the quality of an article based on: Clarity, Accuracy, Completeness, Multimedia Usage. Rate as: L1, L2, L3, or L-1.
